four_ways_to_shop_subtitle: From instant purchases to custom factory orders — Ultrasooq gives you every option.
shop_the_store_description: Browse thousands of products from verified sellers
buy_together_description: Join group buys to unlock deeper discounts
request_a_quote_description: Ask sellers for custom pricing on bulk orders
customer_testimonials_subtitle: Real stories from shoppers and businesses across the region.
testimonial_ahmed_content: Ultrasooq group buying feature saved our business thousands of OMR on bulk office supplies. The platform is intuitive and delivery is always on time.
testimonial_fatima_content: I love how easy it is to find what I need. The quality of products and the variety of sellers make this my go-to shopping destination.
testimonial_omar_content: The RFQ feature has transformed how I source inventory. Getting quotes from multiple factories in one place is a game changer for my store.
newsletter_description: Subscribe for exclusive deals, early access to new products, and personalized recommendations delivered to your inbox.
no_spam_unsubscribe: No spam. Unsubscribe at any time.
connect_with_verified_suppliers: Shop retail, source wholesale, hire freelancers, run group buys, send RFQs, dropship, and trade with factories — all on one platform built for buyers, sellers, and businesses.
global_trade_network_description: Retail shopping, group buying, RFQ requests, dropshipping, factory direct, and freelance services — pick the model that fits.
secure_transactions_description: Verified sellers, escrow-secured payments, multi-currency wallet, real-time chat, and ratings across 20+ countries and 6 currencies.
grow_your_business_description: Storefronts, analytics, dropship management, affiliate program, and dedicated dashboards for shoppers, companies, and freelancers.
ai_is_analyzing: AI 正在分析您的搜索...
ai_understood_your_search: AI 将您的搜索理解为:
try_ai_powered_search: 尝试 AI 驱动的搜索

action_cannot_be_undone_buyers_notified: 此操作无法撤销。所有买家将自动收到通知。

each_point_one_order_joining: 每个点 = 1 个加入交易的订单
deal_ops_subtitle: 管理您的所有交易 — BuyGroup、Dropship、服务和工厂订单
orders_appear_here: 当买家购买您的产品时,它们将显示在这里
sales_funnel_subtitle: 浏览 → 购物车 → 订单 → 14 天收入
track_your_store_performance: 跟踪您的店铺表现和销售
funnel_flow: 浏览 → 点击 → 购物车 → 订单 → 已送达
buygroup_intro: 加入此团购!当有足够的买家加入时,优惠将被激活,每个人都能获得折扣价。
order_sample_evaluate: 订购样品在批量购买前进行评估
money_back_guarantee: 如与描述不符,保证退款
condition_desc_new: 全新、未使用、未拆封、未损坏的物品,原装包装
condition_desc_open_box: 原装包装,已打开但从未使用
condition_desc_refurbished: 经专业修复,恢复正常工作状态
condition_desc_like_new: 已使用但状况极佳,接近全新
condition_desc_used: 之前使用过,可能有外观磨损迹象
condition_desc_good: 显示持续使用的磨损,完全可操作
condition_desc_fair: 相当磨损但仍可正常工作
condition_desc_for_parts: 无法按预期工作,需要维修
frequently_purchased_together: 经常与此产品一起购买
what_is_a_buygroup_desc: 团购是一种集体购买系统,多个客户聚在一起以更好的价格购买产品。当您在团购中预订产品时,即为该商品保留位置。
buygroup_step_2: 点击"预订"以保留您的物品
buygroup_step_3: 等待团购达到所需的参与人数
buygroup_step_4: 团购完成后,您将收到通知并可继续付款
buygroup_step_5: 只有在团购达到其目标后,您的预订才会被确认
buygroup_note_1: 您的预订是预订,不是立即购买
buygroup_note_2: 您可以在团购关闭前取消预订
buygroup_note_3: 如果团购未达到目标,您的预订将被自动取消
buygroup_note_4: 您将收到有关团购状态的通知
customize_placeholder: 描述您的定制要求 — 颜色、尺寸、材料、品牌、包装等。
upload_reference: 上传参考图片、规格或设计
customization_request_info: 您的定制请求将发送给卖家。他们将审查您的要求并回复报价,通常在24-48小时内。您也可以在等待时将标准产品添加到购物车。
